skills.title: Tired diver
skills.description: Recognise signs of a tired diver at the surface, establish buoyancy and tow the diver to safety.
skills.performanceStandard: Recognition of fatigue, positive buoyancy established, controlled tow to exit point.

skills.title: Panicked diver
skills.description: Respond to a panicking diver at the surface: approach defensively, establish contact, control and calm the diver, tow to safety.
skills.performanceStandard: Defensive approach, effective control of panicking diver, tow to safety without endangering rescuer.

skills.title: Shore-based assistance
skills.description: Perform a rescue of a distressed diver from shore using reaching, throwing and wading assists.
skills.performanceStandard: Correct use of reaching, throwing and wading techniques; diver assisted to safety.

skills.title: Underwater problems
skills.description: Identify and respond to a diver experiencing difficulties underwater: share air, perform a controlled ascent and assist the diver to the surface.
skills.performanceStandard: Problem recognition, air sharing initiated, controlled ascent at ≤ 9 m/min, diver brought to surface.

skills.title: Missing diver
skills.description: Conduct an organised underwater search for a missing diver using an appropriate search pattern.
skills.performanceStandard: Search initiated within 1 minute, systematic pattern executed, area effectively covered.

skills.title: Surfacing an unresponsive diver
skills.description: Bring an unresponsive diver to the surface from depth using a controlled buoyant lift.
skills.performanceStandard: Controlled ascent at ≤ 9 m/min, airway management maintained throughout lift.

skills.title: Unresponsive diver at the surface
skills.description: Manage an unresponsive diver at the surface: establish buoyancy, open airway, check for breathing and provide rescue breaths.
skills.performanceStandard: Positive buoyancy established, airway opened, breathing check within 10 seconds, rescue breaths delivered.

skills.title: Exits
skills.description: Remove an unresponsive diver from the water using appropriate exit techniques (shore, boat or platform).
skills.performanceStandard: Diver removed from water safely without interrupting rescue breaths for more than briefly.

skills.title: First aid and emergency oxygen
skills.description: Provide first aid, CPR and emergency oxygen to a non-breathing diver, and activate the emergency medical services.
skills.performanceStandard: CPR and O₂ delivery initiated promptly, EMS activated, care continued until handover.

skills.title: Rescue coordination
skills.description: Coordinate rescue team actions including equipment preparation, task assignments and emergency procedures.
skills.performanceStandard: Tasks delegated clearly, equipment staged, emergency plan followed without confusion.

skills.title: Scenario: Unresponsive diver underwater
skills.description: Complete rescue scenario: locate an unresponsive diver underwater, perform a controlled buoyant lift, surface management with rescue breaths, tow to exit, remove from water, provide first aid / CPR / emergency oxygen and activate EMS.
skills.performanceStandard: Full scenario completed without prompting: lift, surface management, tow, exit, first aid — all within acceptable time and technique standards.

skills.title: Scenario: Unresponsive diver at surface
skills.description: Complete rescue scenario: respond to an unresponsive diver at the surface, establish buoyancy, open airway, provide rescue breaths, tow to exit, remove from water, provide first aid / CPR / emergency oxygen and activate EMS.
skills.performanceStandard: Full scenario completed without prompting: surface management, tow, exit, first aid — all within acceptable time and technique standards.
